_doc: Live routed LLM contract used by planUberQueries() in Stage 04 Search Planner.
system_prompt_rules: cover different angles instead of repeating base_queries
prioritize manufacturer docs, manuals, labs, and trusted spec databases
also include official support pages and product comparison sites
never put domain names in query text
focus on gaps not already covered by archetype-emitted sources
prioritize critical unresolved fields when present
normalization_and_post_processing: query text is normalized and deduped by lowercase form
fallback queries are deduped baseQueries capped to the stage cap
result queries are capped to the stage cap
preferred_domains and negative_filters are also deduped

failure_modes.no_plan_route_api_key: returns source deterministic with deduped base queries
failure_modes.no_searchPlanner_model: returns source deterministic with deduped base queries
failure_modes.llm_call_failure: returns source deterministic_fallback with deduped base queries
failure_modes.empty_llm_query_list: returns source deterministic_fallback with deduped base queries
